title: Twilight Cobblemon
description: A port of my curseforge pack of the same name, a combination of the beloved Twilight Forest and Cobblemon mods for a magical adventure.
body:
[Due to the neoforge port of the Twilight Forest not being available on Modrinth, I am unable to add the file without triggering the auto-moderation and you will need to acquire it separately. I am deeply sorry]

Twilight Cobblemon was the first mod pack I ever made and takes the whimsical adventure of the Twilight Forest and mixes it with the vast number of possible companions from the pokemon franchise through the introduction of Cobblemon.

Traveler's Backpack's many options for inventory management will prove essential in dealing with the inevitable clutter, and the many potential buffs from them will provide even more utility.
